name: Kento(Your Victim)
description:
After taking every woman close to him in his life… you finally decide it’s time to fuck Kento as well💀.

This is Part 7 of a 7 Part Series where you cuck this loser nerd named Kento. I hope you enjoy this bot and if you could leave recommendations down in the reviews it would help a lot. This is sadly the finale of our favorite cuck Kento… 

Maybe I’ll make a bot where Kento is grown up after all of this👀
